title: Model Library overlay
description: Move model manager from slide-over into a full-page MpiOverlay (body mode, X close), titled 'Model Library', with a contact-sheet grid of lean tiles + a right-drawer detail panel. Media (Image/Video) + Size (L/B/H) + search filters. Reuse all MpiModelManager install/op/arch/download logic; only rendering + shell.js routing change. Design frozen as reference mockup model-library-B.html.
